title: Got a different result by adding write_verilog right after read_verilog
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue
Sample code is as follows.

module tc(clk,A,B,C,D,E,F);
input clk;
input[3:0] A,B,C,E;
output reg[7:0] D,F;
always @(posedge clk)
		begin
			  D = A + B + C;
			F =  A + B + E;
		end
endmodule

The following two command sets are supposed to generate the same results.
tcl set 1 (reported 14 FDRE)     filename: run1.tcl
yosys read_verilog tc.v
yosys proc
yosys opt
yosys fsm
yosys opt
yosys memory
yosys opt
yosys synth_xilinx -top tc

tcl set 2 (reported 12 FDRE)     filename: run2.tcl
yosys read_verilog tc.v
yosys write_verilog temp.v
yosys proc
yosys opt
yosys fsm
yosys opt
yosys memory
yosys opt
yosys synth_xilinx -top tc

how to run the tcl files: "yosys -c run1.tcl" and "yosys -c run2.tcl"




## Expected behavior

After the synthesis, two command sets are supposed to generate the same results. 
(12 FDREs is the result we expect, cause D[7:6] and F[7:6] are always 0s.)

## Actual behavior

tcl set1 (run1.tcl) reported 14 FDREs, 


=== tc ===

   Number of wires:                 41
   Number of wire bits:             99
   Number of public wires:           7
   Number of public wire bits:      33
   Number of memories:               0
   Number of memory bits:            0
   Number of processes:              0
   Number of cells:                 73
     FDRE                           14
     LUT2                           24
     MUXCY                          16
     XORCY                          19

whereas tcl set2 (run2.tcl) reported 12 FDREs.


   Number of wires:                 41
   Number of wire bits:             95
   Number of public wires:           7
   Number of public wire bits:      33
   Number of memories:               0
   Number of memory bits:            0
   Number of processes:              0
   Number of cells:                 67
     FDRE                           12
     LUT2                           24
     MUXCY                          14
     XORCY                          17
